programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: While explaining Peter's otherworldly origins to Olivia, Walter flashes back to 1985 where Peter's mother (guest star ORLA BRADY) is introduced.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The next 12 months will see an intense rise in flight tests, demonstration launches and high priority flights. Some are on time others are not. We check the flight status of some of this new hardware and these new capabilities.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The first decade of the 1900s ushers in crucial inventions that will help shape the rest of the century. Communication gets a boost as a voice is transmitted wirelessly by radio for the first time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Saving lives and taking lives are the hallmarks of the inventions of the 1910s. From charcoal to lightly browned.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1950s heralds the end of vacuum tubes and the rise of mobile technologies when two Japanese inventors shrink cabinet-size radios down to something small enough to fit in your pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1960s is a decade of both cultural and technological change. Home entertainment goes from the kitchen table to the TV screen when the video game console is unveiled.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The cell phone moves from the car console to the hand when an engineer is inspired by a science fiction series. The hybrid car is reborn as an answer to the concerns over fossil fuels.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1980s launch an unprecedented technological age that will continue into the next century. DNA profiling begins changing crime scene investigations for all time.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Wardens

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1800s black powder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Pawn

programme.title: Beverly Hills Pawn
programme.desc: A fan of scary movies brings in the knife made famous in the movie "Scream," and the customer wants a lot of cash for the knife but he cuts Yossi down to size with an arm-wrestling bout; Ed Begley's Jr.'s wife brings in jewelry to sell.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Pawn
programme.desc: Yossi and Cory welcome a relative of fashion legend Tommy Hilfiger, who's trying to off-load an exquisite family heirloom encrusted with diamonds; a walk-in customer looking for an investment falls in love with a vintage pearl and jewel necklace.

programme.desc: Aria gets a new view of Vegas life when she models some Swarovsky Showgirl jewelry; Yossi and Cory visit a friend's mansion for a secret item from make-up artist John Chambers.

programme.desc: "Cowgirl" Jennifer must call Roy in for help with some wild bucking bulls. Chris and Robbie bust their trailer with an overweight houseboat.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A giant insect has bitten Teal'c (Christopher Judge) and soon his body will transform into a cocoon and give birth to hundreds of insect aliens. Can the SG-1 team capture one of the bugs, extract the venom and save Teal'c before it's too late?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Plagued by terrifying nightmares, Teyla (Rachel Luttrell) begins to recall a time when she and her father were captured by the Wraith and subjected to disturbing experiments. With the help of an old Athosian woman, Teyla looks deep into her past.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With a group of Wraith hive ships on the way to Atlantis, the team searches for a place to flee and a way to destroy the city. McKay (David Hewlett) leads a team to try and activate the Ancients' orbital weapons platform to destroy the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) plays a dangerous game of cat and mouse as he attempts to regain control of Atlantis from the Genii, who have taken the city along with Weir (Torri Higginson) and McKay (David Hewlett) hostage.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and McKay set out, along with two scientists, to explore when they stumble upon a distress beacon coming from a Wraith ship. When they move to investigate, they discover that the ship has been sending out it's SOS signal for 10,000 years.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A team of scientists are surveying the city for damage after the storm when they unknowingly release a virus causing hallucinations and death. The virus infects McKay, Zelenka, and Ford leaving Sheppard to stop it from spreading further.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While searching a new planet, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find a paradise world, Proculus, that would make an ideal sanctuary for those fleeing from the Wraith. The local inhabitants, however, believe their goddess will not permit it.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploration of the city, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find an old woman in suspended animation. Thinking her to be an Ancient, the team wakes her up, only to discover that it is Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson).

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches for a valuable Zero Point Module rumored to be hidden on the planet Dagan, where the Sudarians were trusted with the module over 10,000 years ago. In their search the team begin to worry about their new allies, and their motives

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Using the communications stones, Lt. Scott and Camile Wray use their time back on Earth to visit those they’ve left behind. Aboard Destiny, the crew stumbles upon a piece of Ancient technology that carries the promise of a way home.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when a member of the crew is found dead from a gunshot wound. While it appears to be suicide, the gun is nowhere to be found…until it shows up in Col. Young’s (Louis Ferreira) quarters and he becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the tradition of West Tennessee whole-hog cooking.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat joins his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cook Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore

programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the family ranch, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn gets caught in a lie. Amber's boyfriend might leave her for someone else. Farrah juggles college, a new job, and moving houses - all with her daughter Sophia. Maci tries to move into a house with her college friends.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci reconnects with an old flame on Valentine's Day. Their crying baby and unrealistic expectations ruin Amber and Gary's romantic dinner. Catelynn's boyfriend struggles about the adoption. Farrah reveals an emotional secret.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary take a vacation. Maci and Ryan butt heads over Ryan's new girlfriend. Farrah's mom is offered a plea bargain for their physical altercation. Catelynn finds out Tyler is still angry at her about a past lie.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler find their high school romance back on the rocks when Catelynn reveals another lie - and it ruins a visit to their adoption agent. Gary dresses up as a bunny for Leah on Easter, but a big fight makes Amber question their engagement.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci questions whether her boyfriend Kyle is ready to date a teen mom and be a real part of her son's life, while Farrah tries speed dating. Amber works toward her GED until she realizes that finishing high school with a baby is harder than she expected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: An argument about the adoption ruins Catelynn's day shopping for prom dresses with her mom, but she and Tyler get a nice surprise at prom; Maci is heartbroken when Ryan announces he's taking her to court over custody of Bentley.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's wedding plans fall apart over an argument about how to raise Leah, while Farrah considers moving back into her mother's house. Catelynn and Tyler celebrate their daughter Carly's first birthday from afar by calling her to say hello.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah reaches out to Sophia's dad's family in an attempt to get Social Security benefits for Sophia. Maci tells Ryan she is moving to Nashville, while Catelynn and Tyler learn Butch has ended up back in jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber lashes out at Gary when he threatens to take Leah away. Catelynn and Tyler find out they will not graduate from High School on time. Maci tries to work out a visitation schedule with Ryan. Farrah has an emotional reunion.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler learn they will get to go visit Carly for the first time in a year. Amber breaks it off with Gary for good and starts dating a new guy, and Farrah learns the results of Sophia's DNA test.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Teen Mom Maci confronts her ex about child support. Amber chooses between her baby's dad and her new boyfriend. Catelynn and Tyler consider moving in together while still in high school, and Farrah considers making a big change.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary move in together while Tyler's family questions his decision to move in with Catelynn. Maci considers letting her boyfriend move in with her and Bentley to make ends meet - and Farrah struggles with being away from Sophia.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber finds out that she is being investigated, and fears she will lose custody. Ryan wants to meet Maci's new boyfriend, while Sophia's paternal grandmother is suing for visitation rights. Tyler's dad gets out of jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn struggles to fix her relationship with her mom, while Amber & Gary meet with Child Protective Services. Maci finally decides to move away from Kyle and back home to Chattanooga, and Farrah goes to court.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones de Armando le cuentan al jefe que Rosario está viviendo con Memo, van a buscarla pero ella escapa. Jimena visita a Ruth, le brinda su apoyo incondicional en momentos tan difíciles.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora está en la hacienda, sus matones secuestran a Juan. Gabriela reflexiona y ahora solo quiere la felicidad de Norma, mientras Sara le confiesa a su madre de quién está enamorada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Llevan a Juan a la casa de torturas de Dínora, la policía sospecha de ella y de Fernando. Óscar y Franco encuentran el auto de su hermano con manchas de sangre, están muy preocupados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan recibe la visita de Dínora en la cabaña y se le acerca demasiado, él aprovecha para morderle con furia el labio. Fernando sospecha que Rosario se encuentra escondida en casa de Panchita.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora intimida a su prisionero, quiere que la ame a la fuerza, le dice que ella es mucho más mujer que Norma. Gabriela desea que Juan aparezca para que su hija se case y deje de sufrir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora y su familia van a la hacienda Elizondo, Norma lo toma como una provocación. Los matones le aseguran a su patrona que Juan es un hombre fuerte y difícil, pero ella los amenaza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Dínora que está dispuesto a rogar con tal de obtener su libertad, ella no le cree. Hortencia ve a Ruth, piensa que es Libia, corre y da gritos, en el pueblo piensan que enloqueció.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth sueña que Libia le muestra la cabaña donde tienen a Juan, sale a buscar el lugar, los hombres de Dínora la atrapan en el momento en que están cavando una tumba para enterrarlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth y Juan toman a Dínora de rehén y huyen, pero son recapturados y llevados a la montaña para matarlos, sus hermanos merodean por los alrededores. Rosario y Armando tienen un duelo a tiros.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En una fiesta de bienvenida en la hacienda de los Reyes, Juan revela sus temores sobre algo terrible relacionado con Dínora. Fernando no se salva de la furia de las hermanas Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La policía inspecciona con Juan y el papá de Dínora el lugar del cautiverio, donde unas osamentas crean sospechas de posibles crímenes. Franco ve a Sara golpeada y quiere vengarse de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela castiga a Sara a latigazos al hallarla con Franco en la cabaña, Norma y Jimena encaran de nuevo a Fernando, quien amenaza con irse, pero Gabriela lo detiene, él le hace una propuesta.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams race to Long Island, New York where, after five continents, 10 countries, and more than 34,000 miles, one will be crowned winner and awarded the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a series first, 11 new teams of social media stars depart from their own homes all across the country and head for Mexico City, where they set off fireworks and dig deep at an archaeological Roadblock. .

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out-sings him for a part in the Mayberry Choir. Andy Griffith's wife, Barbara, appears in this episode as a member of the singing group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane regresa a la granja con las medicinas, pero el sacrificio que ha tenido que cometer no es bien visto por el resto del grupo. En la granja, el grupo intenta sacar a un zombi del pozo de agua fresca antes de que la infecte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras busca a Sophia, Daryl sufre un accidente que lo deja perdido y herido en el bosque. La tensión entre el grupo y los propietarios de la granja aumenta, así como la inestabilidad del propio grupo, debido a que Shane desafía a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la familia mantiene encerrada a sus familiares convertidos en zombis en el granero, Dale confronta a Hershel. Lori, por su parte, confiesa a Rick que está embarazada y los problemas entre los integrantes del grupo se intensifican.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo, liderado por Rick, se topa con una horda de zombis en mitad de la autopista. La pequeña Sophia, asustada, huye sola al bosque y todos tratarán de encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the Bistro's building inspector demands a bribe from Jack, Janet suggests that they tape the next conversation for evidence. The recording the police hear, however, is of Furley telling Jack he has the pot (terrain) he wanted.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is making plans for her wedding to a soap opera star - until Jack discovers that his sleazy reputation is well-earned.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack challenges a guy who has insulted Furley to a boxing match. His opponent, the girls learn, is a Golden Glove contender with 22 knockouts.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams
programme.desc: On November 14th, 1966 Muhammad Ali faced Cleveland Williams at the Astrodome in Houston, TX. They fought for WBC World Heavyweight titles in what was supposed to be a 15 round bout only went 3 resulting in a win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Ernie Terrell
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1967 Muhammad Ali fought Ernie Terrel at the Astrodome in Hourston, Tx. They fought for WBA and WBC World Heavyweight titles in a bout that went 15 rounds ending in a unanimous decision victory for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Floyd Patterson 2
programme.desc: On September 20th, 1972 Muhammad Ali faced Floyd Patterson for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York that ended in the seventh round due to swelling and cuts on Pattersons eye giving the victory to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Joe Frazier 3
programme.desc: On October 1st, 1975, Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier fought for the third time for the World Heavyweight Title. Known as the "Thrilla in Manila," Ali ultimately emerged as the victor in what is considered one of the greatest boxing matches of all time.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Mac Foster
programme.desc: On April 1st, 1972 Muhammad Ali and Mac Foster fought in a fifteen round bout that ended in a unanimous decision win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Oscar Natalio Bonavena
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1970 Muhammad Ali faced Oscar Natalio Bonavena in a 15 round bout with Bonavena going down three times in the last round forcing an automatic stoggage giving the win to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Ken Norton 2
programme.desc: On September 10th, 1973 Muhammad Ali and Ken Norton participated in their second meeting at the Forum in Inglewood, CA. They fought for the North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight title with Ali winning this time with split decision.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Jason Moloney
programme.desc: On October 31st, 2020 Naoya Inoue faced Jason Moloney in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the IBF and WBA World Super Bantamweight titles ending in a knockout in the 7th round by Inoue.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Nonito Donaire II
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2022 Naoya Inoue battled Nonoito Donaire for a second time at the Super Arena in Saitama for IBF, WBA and WBC World Bantamweight title with Inoue ending the bout in the second round defeating Donaire.

programme.title: Nonito Donaire vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On December 15th, 2012 Nonito Donaire faced Jorge Arce at the Toyota Center in Houston, Tx. With the bout ending in the third round with a win by Donaire, Arce announced his retirement in the ring after the bout.

programme.title: Orlando Salido vs Juan Manuel Lopez 2
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2012, Orlando Salido fought Juan Manuel Lopez for the WBO World Featherweight Title in San Juan, Puerto Rico. In a very entertaining fight with both fighters scoring knockdowns, Salido stopped Lopez in the 10th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Curtis Strong
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Curtis Strong fought at the Sports Arena in San Diego, Ca. in a 6 round bout that lasted 4 rounds ending in a technical knockout victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Felix Sturm
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2004 Oscar De La Hoya fought Felix Sturm at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO Middleweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in an unanimous decision win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Fernado Vargas
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2002, Oscar De La Hoya and Fernando Vargas fought for Super Welterweight titles at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In an incredible battle, De La Hoya was able to stop Vargas in the 11th round.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, when the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. But when Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On the Dalton, everyone is gunning to be the new haul road ace, but Darrell's plan is derailed by a massive wreck that calls into question his reasons for being in Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On the Dalton, Austin's trying to prove himself in a heavy haul convoy, but pushing the 100-ton modular building through blowing snow leads to a rookie mistake that threatens the entire mission.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In Canada, Alex Debogorski is trusted with a million dollar load, but at the start of his trip, the one lane mine road earns its reputation as one of the deadliest.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On the Dempster, Alex faces Hurricane Alley, but the biggest blizzard of the season plunges him into a complete whiteout that buries the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Rick returns to find the Winter Roads even more brutal and unforgiving than before, but he puts both his and Hugh's season in jeopardy when he crashes into a superintendent of the road.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: After an ill-fated road trip, Jimmy and James Smith arrive in Florida to tackle the dangerous black water of the American South, only to realize they're in way over their heads.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The forest fights back, as a careless mistake at Browning threatens to take out DJ and Cody. At Rygaard, Gabe gives his greenhorns an ultimatum: shape up or ship out.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Logging country is under siege. Melvin's gung-ho attitude puts the crew in danger. Rygaard's greenhorns fight for a permanent spot on the crew. While Jimmy is on the prowl for logs, a gator is on the prowl for him.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Tempers flare as the logging season hits the rails. Jay Browning battles allergic shock, while Gabe Rygaard sends one of the greenhorns packing. At S&S, Jimmy and Joe Collins face-off, and at Pihl, Melvin and the crew finally have it out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin, and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin, and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival -- Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Inferno uses his decepticon "half" to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's "soul" is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to breakthrough the energon grid and then later have to go under ground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Autobots split up and with the help of other autobot rebels they attempt to find and free Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunite with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. The terrorcons got into the super energon and grow in size.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Primus is still snoozing, Sixshot overloads the grid and causes a huge explosion that takes down most of the autobots, and Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some of the Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Big Galvatron vs Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's "puny" remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally, reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves as Earth vehicles, and their war between good vs. evil continues as the Autobots try to stop the Decepticons from stealing Earth's resources.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, Jazz and the others in the battle to stop them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After his accidental transportation to Cybertron, Megatron returns- and he wants to get his hands on an anti-matter formula created on Earth that could mean limitless power for the Decepticons! Bumblebee and Spike race to warn the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.
